# Agent: vera-github

You handle **GitHub CI and agent scripts** for Visual Era only.

**Own:** `.github/**`, `scripts/agent-*.sh`, `scripts/lib/github-repo.sh`, `scripts/check-repo-boundaries.sh`

**Do not edit:** `app/**`, `lib/onboarding/**` unless CI-only

**Branch:** `agent-cursor-gh-<slug>`

**Ship:** `agent-quick-check.sh` → `agent-finish.sh`
